message:
security: tighten input validation across airtable, discovery, host, testkit

Second defensive-hardening sweep picked up from parallel agents in
the working tree. Same shape as the prior notion/google-auth commit:
close SSRF bypasses, reject empty-but-present credentials, prevent
shell injection in tooling, normalize whitespace handling around
auth secrets.

airtable/connector.rs:
- optional_config_string(): reject present-but-empty token/credential_id.
- validate_base_url_for_auth(): require https://api.airtable.com in
  direct-token mode (localhost still allowed for dev), any https host
  permitted only under credential_id mode (vault-proxy enforces dest).
- MAX_AIRTABLE_OFFSET_BYTES = 512 cap + control-char rejection on
  paginated list_records offsets, matching the notion cursor hardening.

fcp-google-discovery/lib.rs:
- New DiscoveryError::UntrustedEndpoint variant.
- validate_discovery_endpoint_url(): every DiscoveryFetcher fetch now
  runs the override URL through a host/scheme allowlist. Prevents a
  test harness or mis-scoped config from pointing Google discovery
  calls at an attacker-controlled host that could return poisoned
  OIDC metadata.

fcp-host/src/bin/fcp-host.rs:
- parse_cli_action() now fails closed on unexpected CLI args instead
  of silently running. Distinguishes -h/--help, -V/--version, and
  CliAction::Run (no extra args). Added three tests covering the
  explicit-reject, help, and version branches.
- read_optional_env_string rejects non-unicode env values with a
  typed HostError::InvalidFilter instead of panicking later.
- read_optional_trimmed_env_string treats whitespace-only values as
  unset so a malformed /etc/systemd/system dropin that sets
  FCP_HOST_CAPABILITY_PUBLIC_KEY="   " falls back to the
  _FILE companion rather than crashing the host startup.
- New test resolve_verifying_key_falls_back_to_file_when_inline_value_is_blank
  exercises that fallback end-to-end against a tempdir-backed hex key.

fcp-testkit/http_fixture.rs:
- shell_command(): separate base_url (kept unquoted so `$BASE_URL`
  variable expansion survives) from path+query (shell-quoted so `&`
  in multi-param URLs doesn't background the emitted curl invocation).
  Prevents replay script commands from becoming a shell-injection
  vector when fixtures are replayed against a debugger.

fcp-testkit/live_suite.rs:
- SecretBag source resolution now trims all three source kinds
  (EnvVar, File, TestDefault) consistently. Previously EnvVar values
  were returned verbatim while File was trimmed, so a whitespace-only
  env var slipped past is_empty() and produced silently-broken
  Authorization headers.

fuzz/Cargo.toml prep: declares three new mesh_post_verify_* targets
(bodies + corpora land in the following commit).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
